chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP D 240 2025 _______________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on CMA No.3681/2025. 2. For orders on office objection No.14. 3. For orders on CMA No.1163/2025. 4. For orders on CMA No.1164/2025. 5. For hearing of main case. 20.02.2025 Syed Shehryar Raza Zaidi, advocate for the petitioner. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Admittedly statutory recourse is available and in presence of adequate remedy, direct recourse to writ jurisdiction could not be justified. While granting urgency, petition is dismissed in limine alongwith pending applications. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
